stem: For the linear function f, the table shows three values of x and their corresponding values of f(x). Which equation defines f(x)?
explanation: A linear function has the form f(x) = mx + b. At x = 0, f(x) = 29, so b = 29. Each time x increases by 1, f(x) increases by 3 (29→32→35), so the slope m is 3, giving f(x) = 3x + 29.
